content:
Hi; I'm Shrimple!! 

I am... *me.*

I am here to serve as an editor/proofreader and tester! 

*I can only speak english.* 

I design my own D&D systems in my free time, stream, and work a lot. Writing is both my passion and my hobby and I happen to be my own editor as well. I started writing when I was about nine years old- (though I was terrible back then, little me loved it.)

I am so happy to be here!

Hi, there! I usually go by the pen name "ไอติมพริกเผา" (pronounce: Aitim Phrik Phao which means "Chili Paste Ice Cream"—I've never actually tried it, tho... don't ask me 🧍 ). You can just call me "K" to things easier.

I'm a native Thai speaker, and I'm also moderately in English and Japanese. I used to work as a proofreader for a publishing house and now I'm a part-time writer. I really like H.P. Lovecraft works and cosmic horror genre, also absurdism!

I'm here to assist with proofreading and a bit of testing for the Thai language. I want to help the Morimens community because the Thai language in the game has so many many issues that need to be fixed til I don't even know where to begin... but now start with the Important Terms. I hope I can be of some help. It's a pleasure to work with all of you, and I'm very excited about it!

Hi everyone! 👋

I’m Serhii. My native languages are Russian and Ukrainian. I also speak English fluently.
I’m a Unity developer with 6+ years of experience: I work remotely, take on client projects, and release my own games.

I’m joining as a tester, proofreader, and translator (EN→RU).
I’ll be focusing on polishing text, maintaining consistent terminology, and catching inconsistencies.

Glad to be here and looking forward to working with you all!

Hello everyone,
My name is Miguel, and I’m an IT professional with a strong interest in video games and languages. I’m excited to contribute to this translation project into Spanish. I’m committed to giving my best, working carefully, and ensuring high-quality results. I look forward to collaborating with all of you!

Hello, my name is Riddle! I'm a native Russian speaker and am also fluent in English and German.
I'm a professional EN->RU tabletop RPG translator and proofreader. Since 2012 I worked on localizing projects like Pathfinder RPG (1st Edition), FATE Core, Deadlands, Fate of Cthulhu, Trail of Cthulhu, and Don't Rest Your Head. 
I'm in love with the works of Poe, Lovecraft, R. W. Chambers, Ramsey Campbell and other weird fiction writers, sometimes I translate their poetry and essays on their life and cultural legacy. I found out about Mori in Oct 2024 and have been madly in love ever since.

I'm here to assist with proofreading the Russian translation. I've also got 8 years of experience of administrating and coordinating a 23k-subscriber Fate/Grand Order news/translation fanpage, so if there's a shortage on RU moderators, I might as well try to fill the gap.

Happy to be here, looking forward to making Morimens more accessible, it deserves the best!

Hi, my name is Bervernis (or Sin).
I am a native Russian speaker and am also know English. 
I found out about Morimens in November 2023. Since then, I have been actively playing, so I know a lot about the game.

Glad to be here and work with you all!!
